- [ ] Orchestration / PLAN.md
- [ ] Planning / blueprints
- [ ] Review
- [ ] Execute / launch / recover
- [ ] Mission Control (status / docs / completion)
- [ ] Resume / upgrade
- [ ] Schemas / templates
